OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
James Michael Byrne, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Michael Driscoll.
Tim Moppin, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Hidemi John Ishii Williges and Cassandra Williges.
The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304-B for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal of Action", which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
